seo.title: Our Services | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: CQC-compliant Healthcare Assistants, Support Workers, and Cleaners for care homes, nursing homes, and supported living across London.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.sub: CQC-compliant healthcare assistants, support workers and healthcare cleaners for care homes, nursing homes and supported living across Greater London.
fields.heading: Our Care Staffing Services in London
fields.image_alt: Support worker from Vigil Care Staffing assisting a service user in a London care setting

fields.body: Vigil Care Staffing is a care-sector staffing agency that supplies vetted, directly employed workers to care providers across Greater London. We fill rota gaps reliably, whether you need a single shift covered or ongoing support. Every placement is matched to your setting and backed by a CQC-aligned recruitment and vetting process.
fields.heading: What we supply

items.body: Vetted healthcare assistants for care homes, nursing homes and supported living, available for planned shifts and short-notice cover.
items.title: Healthcare Assistants

items.body: Support workers who assist with personal care, mobility and daily living across residential, supported-living and specialist services.
items.title: Support Workers

items.body: Healthcare cleaners trained to NHS cleaning standards for care homes, clinics and supported living, helping you maintain a safe environment.
items.title: Healthcare Cleaners

items.body: Reliable short-notice cover when a shift falls through, so your service stays safely staffed.
items.title: Emergency Care Cover

items.body: Experienced overnight workers, from waking nights to sleep-in support, to keep your service settled after hours.
items.title: Night-Shift Care Staff

items.body: Flexible cover for single shifts, block bookings and longer assignments while you manage absence or recruitment.
items.title: Temporary Care Staff

items.body: Live-in carers providing continuous one-to-one support in a person's own home across Greater London.
items.title: Live-in Carers

fields.body: We support care providers of every size across Greater London. Our clients include nursing homes, residential care homes, supported-living and specialist services, mental health services and local authorities. Whether you run a large residential service or a small supported-living provision, our team is ready to help.
fields.heading: Who we work with

items.a: We supply healthcare assistants, support workers and healthcare cleaners, along with emergency, night-shift, temporary and live-in cover.
items.q: What types of staff can you supply?

items.a: Once you share your requirements, our coordination team matches suitable, vetted workers to your shifts and confirms the details with you.
All workers complete enhanced DBS checks, right-to-work verification and reference checks, plus mandatory training in safeguarding and infection control.
We cover providers across Greater London, including central, north, south, east and west London boroughs.

locations.label: Care home CPD and CQC compliance

fields.sub: Share your requirements and we will match vetted workers to your shifts.
fields.heading: Looking for dependable care staff?
